member.name: P:IdentityService.Application.DTOs.CreateIdentityUserRequestDto.Role
member.summary: Legacy single role label (also add role assignments separately).

member.name: P:IdentityService.Application.DTOs.LoginRequestDto.MfaCode
member.summary: Required when MFA is enabled for the account.

member.name: P:IdentityService.Application.Options.SecurityOptions.MfaDevBypassCode
member.summary: When set, login for users with MFA accepts this code (development only; do not use in production).
